# Vendor/company-name watchlist for the schema description review bot.
#
# One name per line. Lines starting with `#` are comments. Matching is
# case-insensitive and whole-word. The review bot flags these names when they
# appear in a changed caption or description (rule 15, Vendor/Company
# Neutrality) so they can be made generic, with vendor names kept to examples
# only. Files under `extensions/` are skipped, since a product name may be the
# modeled domain there.
#
# This list catches the obvious cases deterministically; the LLM reviewer
# handles vendors not listed here. Add new names as needed.

Amazon
AWS
Apple
Atlassian
Box
Broadcom
Check Point
Cisco
Citrix
Cloudflare
CrowdStrike
Databricks
Datadog
Dell
Dropbox
Elastic
F5
Fortinet
GitHub
GitLab
Google
IBM
Intel
Juniper
Microsoft
NVIDIA
Okta
Oracle
Palo Alto
Proofpoint
Rapid7
Red Hat
Salesforce
SAP
SentinelOne
ServiceNow
Snowflake
Sophos
Splunk
Symantec
Tenable
Trellix
Trend Micro
VMware
Zscaler
